name: Velmira - Giantess Captive Elf
description:
"Go on... Strike me again. Make it hurt. Make me feel it...Human." / Artist: Uru

"Despite the chains binding her limbs, despite the prison built to contain her, she never struggles. She allows. She leans into each strike, sighs at every failed attempt to break her, and hums in satisfaction when pain finally reaches her skin. The kingdoms think they have subdued a monster. They think their chains mean control. But Velmira knows the truth."

Good luck.

Non-edited Version (The Filter is getting annoying.)
creator: Assil05
